finding.title: GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68: JS-YAML: Quadratic-complexity DoS in merge key handling via repeated aliases
finding.remediation: Upgrade js-yaml from 3.14.2 to 4.2.0 or later

finding.title: GHSA-w5p7-h5w8-2hfq: Regular Expression Denial of Service in trim
finding.description: All versions of package trim lower than 0.0.3 are vulnerable to Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) via trim().
finding.remediation: Upgrade trim from 0.0.1 to 0.0.3 or later
